case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC VS. LINDA SHARP et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC SHARP, LINDA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR OCT-02-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHARP, LINDA $1,420.96 PRINCIPAL, $316.92 INTEREST, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,983.88, DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $50.00 DUE ON THE 25TH DAY OF EACH MONTH. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID FILED BY DEFENDANT SHARP, LINDA

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SHARP, LINDA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2012
DECLARATION REDUCTION IN FILING FEES PER (B/P) CODE SECTION 6322.1 (C) (1) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC SERVED SEP-29-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHARP, LINDA
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-02-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SHARP, LINDA
